title: SMUTZIGE HANSIE PRESENTEERT DEN LAATSTE PARTY

scenes.prompt: Nuclear explosion opening. Black screen, then massive mushroom cloud. Title text slams in: SMUTZIGE HANSIE PRESENTEERT. Subtitle: DEN LAATSTE PARTY. Radiation symbols, fire particles, screen shake, impact sound.
scenes.subtitle: SMUTZIGE HANSIE PRESENTEERT

scenes.prompt: Rapid-fire montage of chaotic coding moments. Explosions, terminal text flying across screen, Schlange keywords visible: importiert, probiert, gibzurueck. A man in a hoodie typing aggressively at a laptop. Fast cuts. Matrix rain of German keywords.
scenes.subtitle: PROBIERT * AUSSER * ENDLICH

scenes.prompt: Meme-cat chaotic coding energy. A man typing at a laptop like a caffeinated cat. Terminal commands flying. Overdramatic zooms. Green text on black screens. Hacker aesthetic. RGB keyboard flashing.
scenes.subtitle: CODING CAT ENERGY

scenes.prompt: Screen shows Schlange code transforming into Python. Split screen: German keywords on left, Python on right. verkuendet becomes print. defn becomes def. Dramatic reveal: SCHLANGE -- Python auf Deutsch.
scenes.subtitle: SCHLANGE -- Python auf Deutsch

scenes.prompt: Spotify playlist Tom 2000 appears on screen. 2000 tracks scroll past dramatically. Play counts and hours displayed. Music visualization in background. Neon glow.
scenes.subtitle: TOM 2000 -- 2000 Tracks. 5706 Stunden.

scenes.prompt: Giant inflatable beer cow appears on screen. Dramatic zoom. Confetti explosion. Beer taps attached to cow udders. Everyone looks shocked and delighted. Party atmosphere.
scenes.subtitle: Die KI hat entschieden...

scenes.prompt: Full Oktoberfest madness. Beer tables, Lederhosen, a man partying with colleagues. The inflatable cow is visible in the background. Confetti, streamers, people laughing and dancing. Pure chaos.
scenes.subtitle: OKTOBERFEST MADNESS

scenes.prompt: Clean event card with bold typography. Date: Donnerstag, 12. Maerz 2026. Location: YoungOnes Office. Hazard stripes border. Countdown timer effect. Urgent red glow.
scenes.subtitle: Donnerstag, 12. Maerz 2026 -- YoungOnes Office

scenes.prompt: Final explosion. A man walks away from the camera in slow motion. Text appears: Sei dabei -- oder sei ein Viereck. Powered by Schlange logo. Fade to black with nuclear glow.
scenes.subtitle: Sei dabei -- oder sei ein Viereck.
